dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: What a bargain! I should really stock up on that lip tint.

dialogue.speaker: Suy
dialogue.line: Yeah! I'd buy them all if I had the money.

dialogue.speaker: Suy
dialogue.line: Oh! You should try on that tint you just bought, Su-a!

dialogue.speaker: Su-a
dialogue.line: Okay~

dialogue.speaker: Su-a
dialogue.line: Tada!

dialogue.speaker: Suy
dialogue.line: Omg! You look gorgeous!

dialogue.speaker: Su-a
dialogue.line: Really? You mean it?

dialogue.speaker: Su-a
dialogue.line: Could you take a picture of me please?

dialogue.speaker: Suy
dialogue.line: Sure! Have a seat over there.

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: Omg. This song... It's Linkin Park! The owner really has great taste in music.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Ugh, what's up with this song? The owner must have really crappy taste in music, don't you think?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Huh?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Ugh~

dialogue.speaker: Su-a
dialogue.line: Haha, oh, yeah. I know right?

dialogue.speaker: Suy
dialogue.line: Oh, I've been meaning to ask, you're taking Japanese as your second language, right?

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: Yeah, since I can use the credits for social studies, too.

dialogue.speaker: Suy
dialogue.line: Wow, perfect! You know Taehoon, right? There's a guy in his class who's good at Japanese and wants to study together. Wanna study with them? We'd meet every weekend.

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: I still barely understand Hiragana. Maybe I shouldn't.

dialogue.speaker: Suy
dialogue.line: Please~ Come on! It'll help your grades a lot! Let's do it, please?

dialogue.speaker: Suy
dialogue.line: And from what I've heard, the guy in Taehoon's class who's good at Japanese is very handsome.

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: H-Handsome?

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: O-Okay! Japanese! Japanese! Woohoo! Then meet us downtown at the Bugstar tomorrow at two o'clock!

dialogue.speaker: Suy
dialogue.line: Take care~

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: You too~

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The day has finally arrived. Jugyeong Lim gets to talk to a boy.

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: How handsome could he be...?

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: Oh my God. A study group? What if we sit next to each other? And we start getting a little closer...? And what if we go on a date? And then...? OMG, am I finally escaping single life?

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: OMG, this is how it starts...

dialogue.speaker: Suy
dialogue.line: Hey, Jugyeong. What are you doing?

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: You scared me!

dialogue.speaker: Suy
dialogue.line: Oh, right, oh! Can you lend me a face pack?

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: Try buying your own once in a while. She always lends it to me anyway.

dialogue.speaker: Suy
dialogue.line: Thank you~

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The following day. 12:30.

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: Today.

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: I'm going for a more natural look.

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: Brown-toned lenses? Check. Double eyelid glue? Check.

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: Sunscreen? Check. A few light dabs with a CC cushion.

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: Some brown eye shadow for a little bit of depth.

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: Then after using an eyelash curler, some brown eyeliner for a sweet, innocent look.

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: Dab with peach-colored blush.

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: And finally, finish it off with some glossy coral lip tint.

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: Perfect!

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: Selfie for when my makeup is done just right!

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: Shoot! It's 1:45 already??

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: I'm running a bit late :( Is everyone there?

dialogue.speaker: Suy
dialogue.line: Yeah, no prob, hurry up! Lol

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: Ugh, I'm so nervous.

dialogue.speaker: Suy
dialogue.line: Oh, ah, Su-a! She's here!

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: Is that him...?

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: Oh my God, I'm already shaking.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Hi, guys.

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: Whaaat? It's him? From the bookstore?

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: S-Sorry I'm late.

dialogue.speaker: Suy
dialogue.line: It's okay! I told you, didn't I?

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: Why is he here...? Aaahhh, just stay calm.

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: Does he... recognize me...? Maybe he doesn't.

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: Ack! He's staring at me!

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: There's no way he recognizes me.

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: Damn, I'm so screwed!

summary: Jugyeong and her friends are at a cafe where Suy convinces Jugyeong to join a Japanese study group with a handsome guy. Excited, Jugyeong meticulously prepares her makeup for the meeting, only to discover upon arrival that the 'handsome guy' is someone she recognizes from a past embarrassing encounter at a bookstore.
